name: SylvenOS
overview: SylvenOS is an open-source developer ecosystem focused on learning, building, and sharing real-world software projects through community-driven collaboration.
mission: Educate developers through shared knowledge and mentorship
goals: Create a welcoming environment for contributors of all skill levels
Develop high-quality open-source tools, applications, and learning resources
Promote collaboration across diverse technologies and platforms
Help developers gain practical experience through real-world contributions
features: Technical learning resources and educational content

architecture.description: Contributors, maintainers, mentors, and learners collaborating across projects.
Open-source repositories covering web development, developer tools, automation, and educational resources.
Documentation, tutorials, guides, and community-driven learning materials.

contributionGuide: We welcome contributors of all experience levels. Start with issues labeled 'good first issue', follow repository guidelines, write clear commit messages, and ensure tests and documentation are updated before opening a pull request.
